summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PWA, UI animations, warehouse login, and theme toggle features. All features working correctly.

issues: Minor: DialogContent missing 'aria-describedby' for accessibility (Warning in console)

passed_tests: PWA: Service worker registration - 'SW registered' message appears in browser console ✅
PWA: manifest.json loads correctly at /manifest.json with proper PWA metadata ✅
PWA: service-worker.js accessible with network-first API strategy and stale-while-revalidate for static ✅
UI Animations: 8 machine cards have animate-fade-up class for staggered entrance ✅
UI Animations: Working machine (33x33 ICM/Büyük) has machine-working pulse animation class ✅
UI Animations: 8 machine cards have machine-card-hover class for hover lift effect ✅
UI Animations: Theme toggle switches smoothly between dark and light mode with theme-transitioning class ✅
UI Animations: Buttons have hover lift effect via CSS transitions ✅
Warehouse login: depo1/depo123 credentials work at /warehouse ✅
Management login: password buse11993 works at /management ✅
Operator login: ali/134679 credentials work at /operator ✅
Core functionality: Start job from management works (tested with Pardon job) ✅
Core functionality: Complete job from management works (İş tamamlandı response) ✅
Core functionality: Complete/Edit/Pause buttons visible on active job card ✅
Tab switching: All tabs (Makineler, Kullanıcılar, Analiz, Boyalar, Mesajlar, etc.) animate correctly ✅
Turkish characters: BOŞTA, ÇALIŞIYOR, Giriş display correctly ✅
WebSocket: Real-time connections establish correctly (Manager and Warehouse) ✅
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby attribute for screen reader accessibility
seed_data_creation: Started and completed job 'Pardon' on 33x33 (Büyük) machine for testing Complete/Edit functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA service worker is now REGISTERED (previously was disabled). All 3 login flows working (Management, Operator, Warehouse). UI animations working correctly with staggered card entrance and working machine pulse. Theme toggle switches smoothly with 0.3s transition.

PWA.manifest_json: Working - loads at /manifest.json with correct metadata
PWA.offline_strategy: Network-first for API, stale-while-revalidate for static

UI_Animations.animate_fade_up: Working - 8 machine cards have staggered entrance animations
UI_Animations.machine_working: Working - green pulse animation on active machines
UI_Animations.machine_card_hover: Working - hover lift effect with gold border

Core_Functionality.start_job: Working - job starts correctly from management
Core_Functionality.complete_job: Working - job completes with 'İş tamamlandı' response
